attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT COE_PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F_DELS.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE, COE_PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F_DELS.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE, COE_PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F_DELS.GES_DELETE_DATE, COE_PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F_DELS.GES_UPDATE_DATE, COE_PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F_DELS.GES_GLOBAL_NAME as GLOBAL_NAME, COE_PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F_DELS.PERSON_ID 
FROM
 COE_PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F_DELS
WHERE GES_DELETE_DATE
>TO_DATE('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS')
